zh.lifeSummary: 當Mariota MacKay於1351年出生在蘇格蘭Forfarshire格拉米斯時，她的父親Iye IV MacKay of Strathnaver51歲，母親NN MacNeil85歲。她於1367年與Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan在蘇格蘭薩瑟蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1395年2月28日在蘇格蘭阿吉爾奧陳布雷可享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mariota MacKay于1351年出生在苏格兰Forfarshire格拉米斯时，她的父亲Iye IV MacKay of Strathnaver51岁，母亲NN MacNeil85岁。她于1367年与Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan在苏格兰薩瑟蘭结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1395年2月28日在苏格兰阿吉爾奧陳布雷可享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: MacKay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McKay
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Aoidh ‘son of Aodh’, an old personal name meaning ‘fire’. Etymologically, this is the same name as McKee , McGee , McCoy , and McHugh .
History: This is the surname of several Irish and Scottish families, including Clan Mackay, a Highland clan traditionally associated with Sutherland in the far northwest of Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: Mariota
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Mariota MacKay was born in 1351, in Glamis, Forfarshire, Scotland, her father, Iye IV MacKay of Strathnaver, was 51 and her mother, NN MacNeil, was 85. She married Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan in 1367, in Sutherland, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 28 February 1395, in Auchenbreck, Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mariota MacKay est née en 1351, à Glamis, Forfarshire, Écosse, son père, Iye IV MacKay of Strathnaver, avait 51 ans et sa mère, NN MacNeil, avait 85 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan en 1367, à Sutherland, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 28 février 1395, à Auchenbreck, Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mariota MacKay 1351 in Glamis, Forfarshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Iye IV MacKay of Strathnaver 51 und ihre Mutter NN MacNeil 85. Sie hat 1367 in Sutherland, Scotland Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 28. Februar 1395 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Auchenbreck, Argyll, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mariota MacKay è nata il nel 1351 nel Glamis, Forfarshire, Scotland, sua padre, Iye IV MacKay of Strathnaver, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, NN MacNeil, aveva 85 anni. Lei sposato Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan nel 1367, nel Sutherland, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 febbraio 1395, nel Auchenbreck, Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mariota MacKayが1351年にスコットランドForfarshireグラミスで生まれた時，父Iye IV MacKay of Strathnaverは51歳，母NN MacNeilは85歳であった。1367年にスコットランドススエルランドでAlexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1395年2月28日にスコットランドアルグイルアウチェンブレックで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mariota MacKay(이)가 1351년 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 글램이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Iye IV MacKay of Strathnaver(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 NN MacNeil(은)는 85세였다. 그녀는 1367년 스컷랜드 서덜랜드에서 Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1395년 2월 28일 스컷랜드 아그이 오천브레크에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mariota MacKay nasceu em 1351, em Glamis, Forfarshire, Scotland, seu pai, Iye IV MacKay of Strathnaver, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, NN MacNeil, tinha 85 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan em 1367, em Sutherland, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 28 de fevereiro de 1395, em Auchenbreck, Argyll, Scotland, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mariota MacKay родилась в 1351 г. в местности глэмис, Forfarshire, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Iye IV MacKay of Strathnaver было 51 год, а матери, которую звали NN MacNeil, 85. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan в 1367 г. в местности сутирланд, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 28 февраля 1395 г. в местности аучэнбрекк, аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 44 лет.
